message:
feat(python): numpy.fft.ifft2 wrapper parity (franken_numpy-3az7)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.fft.ifft2 covering optional shape
`s`, axes tuple (default (-2, -1)), norm conventions
('backward'/'ortho'/'forward'), and optional `out=` destination.
Test covers default invert, explicit zero-padded s=(6,6), axes=(0,1),
norm='ortho' and 'forward', 3-D batched inversion, and fft2∘ifft2
round-trip identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
